check.description: Check for conflicts when listing exports.

limit.description: Return no more than this many results at once (see resume).

offset.description: The position of the first item returned for a paginated query within the full result set.

resume.description: Continue returning results from previous call using this token (token should come from the previous call, resume cannot be used with other options).

scope.description: If specified as effective or not specified, all export fields are shown.  If specified as user, only fields with non-default values are shown.

sort.description: The field that will be used for sorting. Default is id.

force.description: If true, the export will be created even if it conflicts with another export.

resource_description: This resource applies the standard collection pattern to NFS exports.
